allow: Bash(bash -c 'shopt -s dotglob && mv metadata/main/default/* metadata/ && rmdir metadata/main/default && rmdir metadata/main')

Bash(/dev/null $SF data query --query "SELECT Id, Name, LastRunDate, FolderName FROM Report WHERE \(Name LIKE ''''%Product%'''' OR Name LIKE ''''%ARR%'''' OR Name LIKE ''''%Pillar%'''' OR Name LIKE ''''%Engagement%'''' OR Name LIKE ''''%Discovery%'''' OR Name LIKE ''''%Content%'''' OR Name LIKE ''''%Clarity%''''\) AND LastRunDate \\!= null ORDER BY LastRunDate DESC LIMIT 50" --target-org $ORG_ALIAS --json)

Bash(/dev/null $SF data query --query "SELECT Id, Name, LastRunDate, FolderName FROM Report WHERE \(Name LIKE ''''%Product%'''' OR Name LIKE ''''%ARR%'''' OR Name LIKE ''''%Pillar%'''' OR Name LIKE ''''%Engagement%''''\) AND LastRunDate \\!= null ORDER BY LastRunDate DESC LIMIT 30" --target-org $ORG_ALIAS)
